title: hieracium murorum subsp. ocriodes
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. ocriodes, also known as Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. ocriodes include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
